primary_event.name: The Clock Moves Without Prophecy
primary_event.summary: A quiet day passes without fresh divine insight. Existing tensions and political momentum continue shaping Aeloria.

supporting_events.name: Stabilization: Groth Clans — Groth
supporting_events.summary: Groth Clans committed resources to stabilize Groth.

active_events.name: Stabilization: Gilgeth Clans — internal
active_events.summary: Gilgeth Clans committed resources to stabilize Gilgeth Clans's territory.
active_events.consequences: The internal consolidation effort in Gilgeth Clans's territory reduces unrest and strengthens Gilgeth Clans's administrative grip. Effects will compound if maintained across several ticks.

active_events.name: Stabilization: Groth Clans — Groth
active_events.summary: Groth Clans committed resources to stabilize Groth.
active_events.consequences: The internal consolidation effort in Groth reduces unrest and strengthens Groth Clans's administrative grip. Effects will compound if maintained across several ticks.

active_events.consequences: The internal consolidation effort in Open Sea reduces unrest and strengthens Dreadwind Isles's administrative grip. Effects will compound if maintained across several ticks.

active_events.consequences: The internal consolidation effort in Vilefin reduces unrest and strengthens Vilefin's administrative grip. Effects will compound if maintained across several ticks.

recent_events.text: Across all of Aeloria, a supernatural sign has appeared: a red stage walks up to Lord Adkison and speaks "here is the one who will unite them all". Factions scramble to interpret its meaning.
[DREAM SENT] High Lord Kaelen Adkison dreams: he is being crowned emporor of all aeloria
The day advanced under local simulation while the prophecy engine was unavailable.
The day advanced under local simulation while the prophecy engine was unavailable.
